subtitles.original: 僕にとっての女王様
subtitles.english: My queen...

subtitles.original: そんなあなたを今夜抱きしめる
subtitles.english: I'll hold you tight tonight...

subtitles.original: and 熱い唇をいただく
subtitles.english: and take your hot lips...

subtitles.original: そして何よりも欲しいのよ
subtitles.english: And most of all, I want...

subtitles.original: あなたの心 狂おしいほど
subtitles.english: your heart, so much it drives me crazy.

subtitles.original: It's a party night
subtitles.english: It's a party night,

subtitles.original: Dancin' with us
subtitles.english: dancin' with us,

subtitles.original: Everybody don't stop dance
subtitles.english: everybody, don't stop dancing.

subtitles.original: Let's go just do it!
subtitles.english: Let's go, just do it!

subtitles.original: 茨の道だろうが
subtitles.english: Even on a thorny road,

subtitles.original: 凍てつく夜だろうが
subtitles.english: even on a freezing night,

subtitles.original: 不可能が可能になるさ 君と二人で
subtitles.english: the impossible will become possible, with just the two of us.

subtitles.original: ルパン・ザ・ファイヤー！
subtitles.english: Lupin The Fire!

subtitles.original: だからそうだから
subtitles.english: That's why, yes, that's why,

subtitles.original: 誰も手にした事ないお宝もらう
subtitles.english: I'll take the treasure no one has ever held.

subtitles.original: 狙った獲物は逃がさない
subtitles.english: I won't let my targeted prey escape,

subtitles.original: それがなんだろうと大泥棒
subtitles.english: no matter what it is, I'm a master thief.

subtitles.original: 先の先まで計算
subtitles.english: Calculating way ahead,

subtitles.original: 瞬時にひらめく名案
subtitles.english: a brilliant idea flashes instantly.

subtitles.original: そして「あっ!」と思ったらもう居ない
subtitles.english: And once they think "Ah!", I'm already gone.

subtitles.original: もはや芸術ばりの盗みの美学
subtitles.english: A theft aesthetic that is practically art.

subtitles.original: Put your hands up in the air!
subtitles.english: Put your hands up in the air!

subtitles.original: Let me show you my everything
subtitles.english: Let me show you my everything.

subtitles.original: 夢のこのファンタジーを見てな
subtitles.english: Look at this fantasy of dreams.

subtitles.original: 今こそ走る時なんだ
subtitles.english: Now is the time to run.

subtitles.original: It's show time!
subtitles.english: It's show time!

subtitles.original: そこで見ててよワンマンショー
subtitles.english: Watch me perform my one-man show right there.

subtitles.original: これぐらいの試練じゃ足んないよ
subtitles.english: An ordeal like this is not enough.

subtitles.original: 僕が欲しいのは物じゃない
subtitles.english: What I want is not a thing.

subtitles.original: I steal your heart
subtitles.english: I steal your heart.

subtitles.original: 絶対逃がさん！
subtitles.english: I'll definitely never let you escape!

subtitles.original: 無駄な抵抗はやめて大人しくお縄につけ！ ルパン！逃がさんぞ！
subtitles.english: Stop your useless resistance and surrender quietly! Lupin! You won't escape!

subtitles.original: 誰かが居ないと張り合い無い
subtitles.english: If there's no one around, it's no fun competing.

subtitles.original: 相手が居てこそ間違い無い
subtitles.english: Having a rival makes it real, no doubt.

subtitles.original: 身近にゃ素敵なライバル
subtitles.english: A wonderful rival close by,

subtitles.original: 競い合い互いにハイになる
subtitles.english: competing makes us both get fired up.

subtitles.original: ファイナルステージだ天王山
subtitles.english: It's the final stage, the decisive battle,

subtitles.original: お前と勝負の演奏さ
subtitles.english: the performance of our showdown.

subtitles.original: マジで今夜はサシで
subtitles.english: Seriously, tonight it's one-on-one,

subtitles.original: どっちが勝っても文句はナシで
subtitles.english: no complaints no matter who wins.

subtitles.original: Put your hands up in the air!
subtitles.english: Put your hands up in the air!

subtitles.original: ワルサー使いこなす僕はワルさ
subtitles.english: Handling my Walther, I am bad.

subtitles.original: 曲がったこと嫌いプラスアルファ
subtitles.english: Hating crooked things, plus a little extra.

subtitles.original: ラップマスター ジェダイも目じゃない
subtitles.english: A rap master, even Jedi can't compete.

subtitles.original: しかし可愛い女にも目がない
subtitles.english: But I also have a weakness for cute girls.

subtitles.original: Oh baby それは演技？ or 本気？
subtitles.english: Oh baby, is that acting or for real?

subtitles.original: 僕は君に一本気
subtitles.english: I'm single-minded for you.

subtitles.original: 一本道走り続けます
subtitles.english: I'll keep running down this single path.

subtitles.original: 空へ飛ばす 今日から明日
subtitles.english: Flying into the sky, from today to tomorrow.

subtitles.original: It's a party night
subtitles.english: It's a party night,

subtitles.original: Dancin' with us
subtitles.english: dancin' with us,

subtitles.original: Everybody don't stop dance
subtitles.english: everybody, don't stop dancing.

subtitles.original: Let's go just do it!
subtitles.english: Let's go, just do it!

subtitles.original: 茨の道だろうが
subtitles.english: Even on a thorny road,

subtitles.original: 凍てつく夜だろうが
subtitles.english: even on a freezing night,

subtitles.original: 不可能が可能になるさ
subtitles.english: the impossible will become possible,

subtitles.original: 君と二人で
subtitles.english: with just the two of us.

subtitles.original: ルパン・ザ・ファイヤー！
subtitles.english: Lupin The Fire!

subtitles.original: Let me show you my everything
subtitles.english: Let me show you my everything.

subtitles.original: 夢のこのファンタジーを見てな
subtitles.english: Look at this fantasy of dreams.

subtitles.original: 今こそ走る時なんだ
subtitles.english: Now is the time to run.

subtitles.original: It's show time!
subtitles.english: It's show time!

subtitles.original: そこで見ててよワンマンショー
subtitles.english: Watch me perform my one-man show right there.

subtitles.original: これぐらいの試練じゃ足んないよ
subtitles.english: An ordeal like this is not enough.

subtitles.original: 僕が欲しいのは物じゃない
subtitles.english: What I want is not a thing.

subtitles.original: あんたのハート
subtitles.english: Your heart!

subtitles.original: 愛すべき仲間や家族がいる
subtitles.english: I have lovable friends and family,

subtitles.original: 信念やプライドを曲げずに貫くべし！
subtitles.english: you should carry out your beliefs and pride without bending them!

subtitles.original: ルパン・ザ・ファイヤー！
subtitles.english: Lupin The Fire!

subtitles.original: ルパン・ザ・ファイヤー！
subtitles.english: Lupin The Fire!

subtitles.original: Let me show you my everything
subtitles.english: Let me show you my everything.

subtitles.original: 眩しい眼差しをうけて
subtitles.english: Receiving your dazzling gaze,

subtitles.original: 君のために今日を捨てるよ
subtitles.english: I'll cast aside today for you.

subtitles.original: It's show time!
subtitles.english: It's show time!

subtitles.original: 世界で一人の最愛の君に
subtitles.english: To you, my only beloved in the world,

subtitles.original: 君自身に気持ち伝えたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to convey my feelings to you yourself.

subtitles.original: 僕が欲しいのは物じゃない
subtitles.english: What I want is not a thing.

subtitles.original: あなたのハート
subtitles.english: Your heart!

subtitles.original: 普段はとぼけた三枚目
subtitles.english: Usually a goofy comic character,

subtitles.original: やるときゃ誰より真剣で
subtitles.english: but more serious than anyone when it counts.

subtitles.original: 頼りになるいざという時
subtitles.english: Reliable in times of need,

subtitles.original: こうなりたい誰が見ても素敵
subtitles.english: I want to be like that, looking great to anyone.

subtitles.original: 知性備えたスーパーマン
subtitles.english: A Superman equipped with intelligence,

subtitles.original: 横にはお決まりスーパーウーマン
subtitles.english: and at his side, as always, a Superwoman.

subtitles.original: 残り二小節ラストスパート
subtitles.english: Last spurt with two measures remaining,

subtitles.original: 憧れの男 Lupin The Third!
subtitles.english: of the man I admire: Lupin The Third!

subtitles.original: 獲物は確かに頂いたぜ
subtitles.english: I have indeed taken the prize.

subtitles.original: はい！ ということで
subtitles.english: Yes! So with that,

subtitles.original: 「Grateful Days」と「ルパン・ザ・ファイヤー」を、2曲続けて聴いていただきました！
subtitles.english: you just heard "Grateful Days" and "Lupin The Fire", two songs in a row!

subtitles.original: 「Grateful Days」はですね、
subtitles.english: "Grateful Days" is,

subtitles.original: えーっと、男性2人と女性1人の曲なんですけど、
subtitles.english: well, a song for two males and one female, but...

subtitles.original: 女性のところはね、絶対アズちゃんが良いということで、アズちゃん。
subtitles.english: for the female part, I absolutely wanted Azu-chan, so Azu-chan did it.

subtitles.original: で、ラップパートはもうノエルちゃんの顔しか浮かばなかったので、ノエルちゃんにお願いしました！
subtitles.english: And for the rap part, only Noel-chan's face came to mind, so I asked Noel-chan!

subtitles.original: 二人ともありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you both!

subtitles.original: でね、ルパンの映像が流れて、みんなびっくりしたんじゃない？ ころねもびっくりした。
subtitles.english: And with the Lupin video playing, everyone was surprised, right? Korone was surprised, too.

subtitles.original: で、今日のハッシュタグは、もうね、7周年だって。すごいよね！
subtitles.english: And today's hashtag is... it's already the 7th anniversary. That's amazing, right?

subtitles.original: この上のハッシュタグ、「#戌神ころね7周年」で、ぜひいっぱい呟いてください。
subtitles.english: Please tweet a lot with this hashtag above, "#InugamiKorone7thAnniversary".

subtitles.original: スクショも大丈夫だよ！
subtitles.english: Screenshots are also okay!

subtitles.original: ね、ここのステージ、なんか、今日は違った感じだけど、
subtitles.english: And this stage here... it feels a bit different today, but...

subtitles.original: ここはどこなんでしょうか？
subtitles.english: where could this be?

subtitles.original: どこ？
subtitles.english: Where?

subtitles.original: イヌバレー！
subtitles.english: Inu Valley!

subtitles.original: 素敵。
subtitles.english: Lovely.

subtitles.original: 今日はイヌバレーから、すべてお送りしますので、よろしくお願いします。
subtitles.english: Today, we will be broadcasting everything from Inu Valley, so please look forward to it.

subtitles.original: って思ったんだけどさ、なんか、画面小さくない？って思ったよね、リスナーさんもね。
subtitles.english: And speaking of that, don't you think the screen is a bit small? I bet you listeners thought so too, right?

subtitles.original: ころねもちょっと思ったので、ちょっとね、
subtitles.english: Korone thought so too, so...

subtitles.original: あ、ちょっと待って！
subtitles.english: Ah, wait a minute!

subtitles.original: なんか、縮まってる！縮まってる！
subtitles.english: Wait, it's shrinking! It's shrinking!

subtitles.original: やめて！やばい、やばい！
subtitles.english: Stop! Oh no, oh no!

subtitles.original: 潰れちゃうよ、これ。
subtitles.english: I'm gonna get crushed!

subtitles.original: ちょっと押して、今は令和なのでね、画面を広く使いたいので、
subtitles.english: Let me push them back. We are in the Reiwa era now, so I want to use a wider screen...

subtitles.original: あっち行け！
subtitles.english: Go away!

subtitles.original: もうちょっとあっち行け！
subtitles.english: Go away a bit more!

subtitles.original: もうちょい！
subtitles.english: A bit more!

subtitles.original: オッケー、オッケー、オッケー。
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, okay.

subtitles.original: こっちは？
subtitles.english: What about this side?

subtitles.original: あっち行け！
subtitles.english: Go away!

subtitles.original: あれ？そんなにころねと居たいの？おいで。
subtitles.english: Oh? Do you want to stay with Korone that much? Come here.

subtitles.original: 本当に来るなよ！本当に来るなよ！
subtitles.english: Don't actually come! Don't actually come!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Process for Korone's Performance**

Okay, so the task is to generate subtitles for this video of Inugami Korone's performance, specifically the song "ルパン・ザ・ファイヤー" (Lupin The Fire), followed by her speaking to the audience.  My approach here is methodical, as always. First, I need to synchronize the audio with the text, meticulously matching timestamps to each line of the song and spoken dialogue. I'll use the provided `<scene_and_lyrics_reference_json>` as the core data, but I will be correcting and adjusting the timestamps as I listen to make sure they're perfectly aligned.

I begin by breaking down the audio into segments.  Each segment represents a distinct lyric or spoken phrase.  I'm already thinking about potential complexities – instrumental sections, the Zenigata voiceover – things that need careful handling.

For example, I identified the Zenigata bit as a critical point. I listened very carefully to that section because the provided transcription could use some cleaning up.  That required some very precise transcribing, to nail down the exact phrasing and timing.  I needed to make sure I got that exactly right.

Another key part involved ensuring the lyrics were accurate.  I compared the provided lyrics with the audio, and made necessary adjustments for both accuracy and naturalness in the spoken parts. For instance, in the "Let me show you my everything" line, there was a difference between the formal lyric and how it sounded in the recording. I made sure to select the best option.

I also kept an ear out for any nuances in intonation or emphasis that might affect the translation. I needed to ensure that the translation captures the spirit of the original language while maintaining grammatical correctness.

During the speaking segment, I focused on transcribing Korone's exact words, including any stutters, pauses, and interjections.  For instance, when she spoke of the screen size and the text encroaching, I listened very carefully to the exact words to ensure a perfect translation for the subtitles.

Finally, I made sure all the timestamps were accurate and the translations were contextually correct.  The format needs to be perfect, no extraneous tags, and it has to be a smooth and understandable translation.
